title: Onboarding, Animations & Reward Systems
summary: Polishes moment-to-moment feel with distributed onboarding across levels 1-4, idle circuit animations, improved star reveal anticipation, RUN button press depth, grid snap overlay during drag, menu/UI navigation sounds, timer visual feedback, a daily play streak system with freeze tokens, a post-completion circuit journey summary, and a perfect retry button after hint-penalized completions.

tasks.description: Distribute onboarding tooltips across Levels 1-4 instead of concentrating on Level 1. Level 1: 'Drag a gate from the toolbox onto the board'. Level 2: 'Click output pins then input pins to draw wires'. Level 3: 'Match the truth table — each row must be correct'. Level 4: 'Use hints if stuck. Fewer gates = more stars!'
acceptance_criteria: Level 1 shows tooltip about dragging gates
Level 2 shows tooltip about drawing wires
Level 3 shows tooltip about truth tables
Level 4 shows tooltip about hints and stars
Each tooltip only shows once (localStorage flag per level)
Tooltips auto-dismiss after 8 seconds
Returning players who already completed those levels don't see tooltips

tasks.description: Add idle circuit animation — slow-moving dots travel along completed wires when no simulation is running. Gives the circuit a 'living' feel while the player thinks.
acceptance_criteria: After wires are placed and no simulation running, subtle dots travel along wire paths
Dots move at a slow, gentle pace (not distracting)
Animation pauses during simulation
Animation restarts when simulation completes
Performance is acceptable with 10+ wires

tasks.description: Improve star reveal with 400ms stagger, anticipation drum-roll sound per star, and scale bounce animation per star reveal.
acceptance_criteria: Stars reveal one at a time with 400ms delay between each
Each star has a scale bounce (0 → 1.3 → 1.0) animation
A brief ascending chime plays as each star appears
3-star reveal feels celebratory with the final star having extra emphasis

tasks.description: Add physical press-depth feel to the RUN button. On mousedown/touchstart, button visually depresses (translateY, darker shade, reduced shadow). On mouseup/touchend, it springs back. Add a mechanical click sound on press.
acceptance_criteria: RUN button depresses visually on mousedown (2-3px translateY, darker background, reduced box-shadow)
RUN button springs back on mouseup with a quick ease-out transition
Effect works on both mouse and touch
Existing click/simulation behavior is not affected

tasks.description: Show grid snap overlay when dragging a gate. Render a subtle grid of crosshairs/dots near the drag position. Highlight the nearest snap point.
acceptance_criteria: When a gate is being dragged, nearby grid snap points become visible
The nearest snap point is highlighted more brightly
Grid overlay disappears when drag ends
Does not interfere with existing drag behavior

tasks.description: Add menu/UI navigation sounds: hover blip on buttons, screen transition whoosh, level-select card hover tick.
acceptance_criteria: Hovering over level select buttons plays a subtle tick
Screen transitions (level select → gameplay, back, etc.) play a whoosh sound
Sounds respect mute setting
Sounds are subtle and not annoying on repeated interaction

tasks.description: Add timer visual feedback with color changes at thresholds: green (< 60s), yellow (60-120s), orange (120s+). Timer text color transitions smoothly.
acceptance_criteria: Timer text is green for first 60 seconds
Timer text transitions to yellow between 60-120 seconds
Timer text turns orange after 120 seconds
Color transitions are smooth
Timer hidden during campaign mode still (only visible in challenge/sandbox per existing behavior)

tasks.description: Implement daily play streak system with freeze tokens. Track consecutive days played, award freeze tokens (1 per 3-day streak), freeze tokens auto-consumed if a day is missed. Show streak on level select screen.
acceptance_criteria: Streak counter displayed on level select screen
Playing on consecutive days increments streak
Missing a day consumes a freeze token instead of resetting
Freeze tokens earned every 3 consecutive days
Streak persists in localStorage
Missing a day without freeze tokens resets streak to 0

tasks.description: Show a 'Your Circuit Journey' summary modal after completing all campaign levels. Displays: total gates placed, favorite gate type (most used), fastest level, total stars, total play time, achievements unlocked.
acceptance_criteria: Modal appears after completing the final campaign level
Shows total gates placed lifetime stat
Shows total stars earned
Shows total play time
Shows achievements unlocked count
Has a 'Back to Levels' button
Does not block normal completion flow (shows after chapter complete modal)

tasks.description: After completing a level where hints were used (no Pure Logic badge), show a 'Try for 🧠 Pure Logic?' retry button. Clicking it reloads the level with a clean slate.
acceptance_criteria: Button appears only when hints were used during the completion
Button text is 'Try for 🧠 Pure Logic?'
Clicking reloads the current level (clean slate)
Button does not appear in challenge/sandbox modes
Button does not appear if level was already solved with Pure Logic

testing_focus: Onboarding tooltips show correct message per level and don't show for returning players
Idle wire dots render smoothly and don't interfere with simulation
Star reveal timing and sound play correctly for 1, 2, and 3 star results
RUN button press depth works on desktop and mobile
Grid snap overlay appears during drag and disappears after
Timer colors change at correct thresholds
Streak system handles edge cases (same day revisit, freeze token consumption)
Journey summary shows correct stats after all levels complete
Perfect retry button only shows when appropriate
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced that breaks core gameplay (gate placement, wire drawing, simulation), revert to previous commit
